description: Official website of Matthew Raynor — AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer. Explore his portfolio, projects, and art.

portfolio.title: My Portfolio
portfolio.description: Production-grade AI and full-stack projects — from agentic AI assistants to enterprise computer vision to logistics platforms.

featured_projects.title: Agentic AI Shopping Assistant
featured_projects.description: LangChain + Claude AI agent that manages carts, searches semantically, and visualizes art on walls.

featured_projects.title: IDP EasyCapture — Enterprise Computer Vision
featured_projects.description: TensorFlow.js, MediaPipe, and OpenCV for real-time photo validation and background compositing — built for IDP Americas.

featured_projects.title: ToteTaxi.com
featured_projects.description: Full-stack luxury delivery platform with React 19, TypeScript, dynamic pricing, Stripe, and Onfleet.

featured_projects.title: Eric Art Mover
featured_projects.description: Operations platform for fine art logistics with calendar scheduling and PDF invoicing.

store.description: Fine art drone and seascape photography by Matthew Raynor. Features an AI shopping assistant powered by LangChain and Claude.
store.ai_agent: The store includes a live agentic AI shopping assistant — try it out!

chatbot.greeting: Hey! I'm here to tell you about Matt's work — AI engineering, full-stack development, production projects, and his art. What would you like to know?
chatbot.fallback: I'm sorry, I didn't understand that. Could you please rephrase your question or try a different query?
